; Alessio Faraci (https://github.com/alefaraci)
; Selection-menu button recipe from rmitchellscott's tocFromSelection.qmd; cross-doc + .rm-storage patterns from betterToc (GPL-3.0-only): https://github.com/rmitchellscott/xovi-qmd-extensions
; SPDX-License-Identifier: GPL-3.0-only
; Modified: 2026-07-09
;
; Requires: https://github.com/asivery/rm-xovi-extensions

AFFECT [[11806562588218124596]]
	TRAVERSE ?#[[6504254477]]
	LOCATE AFTER ALL
	INSERT {
		readonly property ~&7083178290016&~ regRmHeader: "reMarkable .lines file, version=6          "
		property ~&197102514&~ regLinks: []
		property ~&7083178290016&~ regCurKey: (~&6504254477&~.~&7712934851008712&~ ? ~&6504254477&~.~&7712934851008712&~.~&254533375641282938&~(~&6504254477&~.~&6504167078&~) : "")
		property ~&197088788&~ regSeq: 0
		property ~&6503679477&~ regArmed: ~&214625660372&~
		property ~&6504243117&~ regPendingSx: 0
		property ~&6504243117&~ regPendingSy: 0
		property ~&6504243117&~ regPendingBx: 0
		property ~&6504243117&~ regPendingBy: 0
		property ~&6504243117&~ regPendingBw: 0
		property ~&6504243117&~ regPendingBh: 0
		property ~&7083178290016&~ regPickSource: ""
		property ~&197088788&~ regPickSourceNum: 0
		property ~&7083178290016&~ regReturnTo: ""
		property ~&7083178290016&~ regConfirmText: ""
		property ~&7083178290016&~ regMenuId: ""
		property ~&7083178290016&~ regEditId: ""
		property ~&7083178290016&~ regDragId: ""
		property ~&6504243117&~ regDragDX: 0
		property ~&6504243117&~ regDragDY: 0
		property ~&6504243117&~ regMoveStartX: 0
		property ~&6504243117&~ regMoveStartY: 0
		property ~&6504243117&~ regMoveStartW: 0
		property ~&6504243117&~ regMoveStartH: 0
		property ~&6503679477&~ regMoveArmed: ~&214625660372&~
		property ~&6504243117&~ regLiveDX: 0
		property ~&6504243117&~ regLiveDY: 0
		property ~&6504243117&~ regDragSceneX0: 0
		property ~&6504243117&~ regDragSceneY0: 0
		property ~&6503679477&~ regDragStartSet: ~&214625660372&~
		property ~&6503679477&~ regCrossActive: ~&214625660372&~
		property ~&6503679477&~ regCrossReady: ~&214625660372&~
		property ~&197088788&~ regReloadToken: 0
		property ~&7083178290016&~ regCrossSrcDocId: ""
		property ~&197088788&~ regCrossSrcPageNum: 0
		property ~&7083178290016&~ regCrossSrcKey: ""
		property ~&6504243117&~ regCrossSrcSx: 0
		property ~&6504243117&~ regCrossSrcSy: 0
		property ~&197102514&~ regCrossSrcBx
		property ~&197102514&~ regCrossSrcBy
		property ~&197102514&~ regCrossSrcBw
		property ~&197102514&~ regCrossSrcBh
		property ~&7083178290016&~ regDialogTitle: ""
		property ~&7083178290016&~ regDialogMsg: ""
		property ~&7083178290016&~ regDialogLinkId: ""
		property ~&7083178290016&~ regBackText: ""
		property ~&197102514&~ regBackTarget: ~&6504117156&~
		property ~&197102514&~ regJumpPending: ~&6504117156&~
		property ~&197088788&~ regJumpTries: 0
		property ~&197102514&~ regUndoStack: []
		property ~&197102514&~ regRedoStack: []
		property ~&197102514&~ regUndoApplyQueue: []
		property ~&197088788&~ regUndoLagMs: 7

		function regDocId() {
			~&7083121450889&~ (~&6504254477&~.~&7712934851008712&~ && ~&6504254477&~.~&7712934851008712&~.~&5972374&~) ? ~&6504254477&~.~&7712934851008712&~.~&5972374&~ : "";
		}
		function regFilePath() {
			~&197102514&~ ~&5972374&~ = regDocId();
			~&5972376&~ (!~&5972374&~) ~&7083121450889&~ "";
			~&7083121450889&~ "file:///home/root/.local/share/remarkable/xochitl/" + ~&5972374&~ + "/rm-linkFromSelection.rm";
		}
		function regReload() {
			~&197102514&~ ~&6504167510&~ = regFilePath();
			~&5972376&~ (!~&6504167510&~) { ~&6504254477&~.regLinks = []; ~&6504254477&~.regSeq = 0; ~&7083121450889&~; }
			~&6504254477&~.regReloadToken = ~&6504254477&~.regReloadToken + 1;
			~&197102514&~ myToken = ~&6504254477&~.regReloadToken;
			~&197102514&~ req = new XMLHttpRequest();
			req.~&6504147419&~("GET", ~&6504167510&~);
			req.onreadystatechange = function() {
				~&5972376&~ (req.readyState === XMLHttpRequest.DONE) {
					~&5972376&~ (myToken !== ~&6504254477&~.regReloadToken) ~&7083121450889&~;
					~&197102514&~ ~&197080206&~ = [];
					try {
						~&197102514&~ ~&180989&~ = req.responseText || "";
						~&197102514&~ ~&180979&~ = ~&180989&~.~&233731717342038&~("[");
						~&5972376&~ (~&180979&~ >= 0) ~&197080206&~ = ~&6502785411&~.parse(~&180989&~.~&254548200562243306&~(~&180979&~));
					} catch (~&180974&~) { ~&197080206&~ = []; }
					~&6504254477&~.regLinks = ~&214582398184&~.~&233731871973028&~(~&197080206&~) ? ~&197080206&~ : [];
					~&197102514&~ mx = 0;
					~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180978&~ = 0; ~&180978&~ < ~&6504254477&~.regLinks.~&7082886407723&~; ~&180978&~++) {
						~&197102514&~ n = ~&7713428776113935&~(String(~&6504254477&~.regLinks[~&180978&~].~&5972374&~).replace("L", ""), 10);
						~&5972376&~ (!~&214629831714&~(n) && n > mx) mx = n;
					}
					~&6504254477&~.regSeq = mx;
					~&6504254477&~.regConsumeCrossPending();
				}
			};
			req.~&6504279475&~();
		}
		function regPersist() {
			~&197102514&~ ~&6504167510&~ = regFilePath();
			~&5972376&~ (!~&6504167510&~) ~&7083121450889&~;
			~&197102514&~ req = new XMLHttpRequest();
			req.~&6504147419&~("PUT", ~&6504167510&~);
			req.~&6504279475&~(regRmHeader + ~&6502785411&~.~&254548178208422824&~(~&6504254477&~.regLinks));
		}

		function regSetPick(~&180991&~) {
			try { ~&254540341572282132&~.regLinkPickMode = ~&180991&~; }
			catch (~&180974&~) {  }
		}
		function regFindLinkAt(~&6504167078&~, sx, sy) {
			~&197102514&~ tol = 5;
			~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180978&~ = 0; ~&180978&~ < regLinks.~&7082886407723&~; ~&180978&~++) {
				~&197102514&~ l = regLinks[~&180978&~];
				~&5972376&~ (l.~&6504167078&~ === ~&6504167078&~ && ~&6502909715&~.~&197079679&~(l.sx - sx) < tol && ~&6502909715&~.~&197079679&~(l.sy - sy) < tol)
					~&7083121450889&~ l.~&5972374&~;
			}
			~&7083121450889&~ "";
		}
		function regArmLink(sx, sy) {
			regEditId = regFindLinkAt(regCurKey, sx, sy);
			regPendingSx = sx;
			regPendingSy = sy;
			regPickSource = regCurKey;
			regPickSourceNum = ~&6504254477&~.~&6504167078&~ + 1;
			regArmed = ~&6504329801&~;
			regArmTimer.~&233743006639214&~();
			regSelfCheckTimer.~&6504295855&~();
			regSetPick(~&6504329801&~);
			~&6504254477&~.~&233745975898428&~.~&6650786433440202278&~();
		}
		function regArmLinkCross(sx, sy, editId, bx, by, bw, bh) {
			regDisarm();
			~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossPick = {
				srcDocId: regDocId(),
				srcPageKey: regCurKey,
				srcPageNum: ~&6504254477&~.~&6504167078&~ + 1,
				srcDocName: (~&6504254477&~.~&7712934851008712&~ ? ~&6504254477&~.~&7712934851008712&~.~&505890565057603928&~ : ""),
				sx: sx,
				sy: sy,
				bx: bx,
				by: by,
				bw: bw,
				bh: bh,
				editId: editId ? editId : regFindLinkAt(regCurKey, sx, sy),
				phase: "browse",
				ts: new ~&6502586279&~().getTime()
			};
			~&5972376&~ (~&7083223278816&~ ~&6504254477&~.~&15738511858360073246&~ === ~&"7713028246101167&~) { ~&6504254477&~.~&15738511858360073246&~();  ~&7083121450889&~; }
		}
		function regMaybeEnterCrossPick() {
			~&5972376&~ (!~&6504254477&~.~&7712934851008712&~) ~&7083121450889&~;
			~&197102514&~ ~&180985&~ = ~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossPick;
			~&5972376&~ (!~&180985&~ || ~&180985&~.phase !== "browse") ~&7083121450889&~;
			~&5972376&~ (~&180985&~.ts && ( new ~&6502586279&~().getTime() - ~&180985&~.ts) > 120000) { ~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossPick = ~&6504117156&~;  ~&7083121450889&~; }
			~&5972376&~ (regDocId() === ~&180985&~.srcDocId) {
				~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossPick = ~&6504117156&~;
				regNotify("Cannot link a document to itself. Choose another");
				~&7083121450889&~;
			}
			regCrossSrcDocId = ~&180985&~.srcDocId;
			regCrossSrcPageNum = ~&180985&~.srcPageNum;
			regCrossSrcKey = ~&180985&~.srcPageKey;
			regCrossSrcSx = ~&180985&~.sx;
			regCrossSrcSy = ~&180985&~.sy;
			regCrossSrcBx = ~&180985&~.bx;
			regCrossSrcBy = ~&180985&~.by;
			regCrossSrcBw = ~&180985&~.bw;
			regCrossSrcBh = ~&180985&~.bh;
			regCrossActive = ~&6504329801&~;
			regCrossReady = ~&214625660372&~;
			regCrossArmTimer.~&233743006639214&~();
			~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossPick = {
				srcDocId: ~&180985&~.srcDocId, srcPageKey: ~&180985&~.srcPageKey, srcPageNum: ~&180985&~.srcPageNum,
				sx: ~&180985&~.sx, sy: ~&180985&~.sy, bx: ~&180985&~.bx, by: ~&180985&~.by, bw: ~&180985&~.bw, bh: ~&180985&~.bh, editId: ~&180985&~.editId, srcDocName: ~&180985&~.srcDocName, phase: ~&"6504167078&~
			};
			~&6504254477&~.~&233745975898428&~.~&6650786433440202278&~();
		}
		function regCommitCross() {
			~&5972376&~ (!regCrossActive) ~&7083121450889&~;
			~&5972376&~ (!regCrossReady) { regCrossCommitTimer.~&233743006639214&~(); ~&7083121450889&~; }
			~&197102514&~ tgt = regCurKey;
			~&5972376&~ (!tgt || !regResolves(tgt)) {  ~&7083121450889&~; }
			~&197102514&~ ~&180985&~ = ~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossPick;
			~&197102514&~ tgtName = (~&6504254477&~.~&7712934851008712&~ ? ~&6504254477&~.~&7712934851008712&~.~&505890565057603928&~ : "");
			~&197102514&~ srcName = (~&180985&~ && ~&180985&~.srcDocName) ? ~&180985&~.srcDocName : ~&"7712934851008712&~;
			~&197102514&~ msg = ((~&180985&~ && ~&180985&~.editId) ? "Re-linked " : "Linked ") + (tgtName || ~&"7712934851008712&~) + " to " + srcName;
			~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossPending = {
				srcDocId: regCrossSrcDocId,
				srcPageKey: regCrossSrcKey,
				sx: regCrossSrcSx,
				sy: regCrossSrcSy,
				bx: regCrossSrcBx,
				by: regCrossSrcBy,
				bw: regCrossSrcBw,
				bh: regCrossSrcBh,
				editId: (~&180985&~ && ~&180985&~.editId) ? ~&180985&~.editId : "",
				targetDoc: regDocId(),
				targetDocName: tgtName,
				targetPageKey: tgt,
				notifMsg: msg
			};
			regCrossActive = ~&214625660372&~;
			regCrossReady = ~&214625660372&~;
			~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossPick = ~&6504117156&~;
			regNotify(msg);
			regCrossReturnTimer.~&233743006639214&~();
		}
		function regCancelCross() {
			~&197102514&~ srcDoc = regCrossSrcDocId;
			~&197102514&~ srcNum = regCrossSrcPageNum;
			regCrossActive = ~&214625660372&~;
			regCrossReady = ~&214625660372&~;
			~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossPick = ~&6504117156&~;
			~&5972376&~ (srcDoc) {
				~&197102514&~ ~&180974&~ = ~&233694067165438&~.~&8399431778896295215&~(srcDoc);
				~&5972376&~ (~&180974&~) ~&254540341572282132&~.~&9497240032101537789&~(~&180974&~, srcNum - 1);
			}
		}
		function regConsumeCrossPending() {
			~&197102514&~ ~&180972&~ = ~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossPending;
			~&5972376&~ (!~&180972&~) ~&7083121450889&~;
			~&5972376&~ (~&180972&~.srcDocId !== regDocId()) ~&7083121450889&~;
			~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossPending = ~&6504117156&~;
			~&197102514&~ matched = ~&214625660372&~;
			~&5972376&~ (~&180972&~.editId && ~&180972&~.editId !== "") {
				~&197102514&~ eid = ~&180972&~.editId;
				regLinks = regLinks.~&197092711&~(function(l) {
					~&5972376&~ (l.~&5972374&~ !== eid) ~&7083121450889&~ l;
					matched = ~&6504329801&~;
					~&7083121450889&~ { ~&5972374&~: l.~&5972374&~, sx: l.sx, sy: l.sy, ~&6504167078&~: l.~&6504167078&~, ~&7083194890448&~: "", targetDoc: ~&180972&~.targetDoc, targetDocName: ~&180972&~.targetDocName, targetPageKey: ~&180972&~.targetPageKey, bx: l.bx, by: l.by, bw: l.bw, bh: l.bh, rot: l.rot };
				});
				~&5972376&~ (matched) {
					regPersist();
					regReloadToken = regReloadToken + 1;
					regReturnTo = "";
					regReturnTimer.~&233743006639214&~();
					~&7083121450889&~;
				}
			}
			regSeq = regSeq + 1;
			~&197102514&~ ~&5972374&~ = "L" + regSeq;
			regLinks = regLinks.~&7082546043425&~([{ ~&5972374&~: ~&5972374&~, sx: ~&180972&~.sx, sy: ~&180972&~.sy, ~&6504167078&~: ~&180972&~.srcPageKey, ~&7083194890448&~: "", targetDoc: ~&180972&~.targetDoc, targetDocName: ~&180972&~.targetDocName, targetPageKey: ~&180972&~.targetPageKey, bx: ~&180972&~.bx, by: ~&180972&~.by, bw: ~&180972&~.bw, bh: ~&180972&~.bh }]);
			regPersist();
			regReloadToken = regReloadToken + 1;
			regReturnTo = "";
			regReturnTimer.~&233743006639214&~();
		}
		function regGoToCross(~&6504032279&~) {
			~&5972376&~ (!~&6504032279&~ || !~&6504032279&~.targetDoc) ~&7083121450889&~;
			~&197102514&~ ~&180974&~ = ~&233694067165438&~.~&8399431778896295215&~(~&6504032279&~.targetDoc);
			~&5972376&~ (!~&180974&~) { regShowDialog("Document not found", "The linked document has been deleted.", ~&6504032279&~.~&5972374&~); ~&7083121450889&~; }
			~&5972376&~ (~&180974&~.~&7712810854541167&~) { regShowDialog("Document not downloaded", "Open it once on this device, then try again.", ""); ~&7083121450889&~; }
			~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossJump = {
				targetPageKey: ~&6504032279&~.targetPageKey,
				linkId: ~&6504032279&~.~&5972374&~,
				~&6503663834&~: { ~&214623780460&~: regDocId(), pageKey: regCurKey, docName: (~&6504254477&~.~&7712934851008712&~ ? ~&6504254477&~.~&7712934851008712&~.~&505890565057603928&~ : "") }
			};
			~&254540341572282132&~.~&9497240032101537789&~(~&180974&~, 0);
		}
		function regConsumeCrossJump() {
			~&5972376&~ (!~&6504254477&~.~&7712934851008712&~) ~&7083121450889&~;
			~&197102514&~ ~&180979&~ = ~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossJump;
			~&5972376&~ (!~&180979&~) ~&7083121450889&~;
			~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossJump = ~&6504117156&~;
			regJumpPending = { ~&197090674&~: ~&180979&~.targetPageKey, ~&6503663834&~: ~&180979&~.~&6503663834&~, linkId: ~&180979&~.linkId };
			regJumpTries = 0;
			regJumpTimer.~&233743006639214&~();
		}
		function regTryJump() {
			~&197102514&~ ~&180979&~ = regJumpPending;
			~&5972376&~ (!~&180979&~) ~&7083121450889&~;
			~&5972376&~ (!~&6504254477&~.~&7712934851008712&~) { regJumpPending = ~&6504117156&~; ~&7083121450889&~; }
			~&197102514&~ ~&197088462&~ = -1;
			try { ~&197088462&~ = ~&6504254477&~.~&7712934851008712&~.~&254543134822321786&~(~&180979&~.~&197090674&~); } catch (e1) { ~&197088462&~ = -1; }
			~&5972376&~ (~&7083223278816&~ ~&197088462&~ === ~&"7082983611378&~ && ~&197088462&~ >= 0) {
				regJumpPending = ~&6504117156&~;
				try { ~&6504254477&~.~&7713405014271992&~(~&197088462&~, ~&14175747548438644067&~.~&10593835380864769165&~.~&7442916920529273295&~); }
				catch (e2) { ~&6504254477&~.~&8399524639036305292&~(~&180979&~.~&197090674&~); }
				~&5972376&~ (~&180979&~.~&6503663834&~) ~&6504254477&~.regShowBackNotif(~&180979&~.~&6503663834&~);
				~&7083121450889&~;
			}
			~&5972376&~ ((~&6504254477&~.~&7712934851008712&~.~&254543134818768527&~ > 0) || regJumpTries >= 8) {
				regJumpPending = ~&6504117156&~;
				~&5972376&~ (~&180979&~.~&6503663834&~ && ~&180979&~.~&6503663834&~.~&214623780460&~) {
					~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossError = { ~&214642559243&~: "Page not found", msg: "The linked page has been deleted.", linkId: ~&180979&~.linkId };
					~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossJump = { targetPageKey: ~&180979&~.~&6503663834&~.pageKey, linkId: "", ~&6503663834&~: ~&6504117156&~ };
					~&197102514&~ be = ~&233694067165438&~.~&8399431778896295215&~(~&180979&~.~&6503663834&~.~&214623780460&~);
					~&5972376&~ (be) ~&254540341572282132&~.~&9497240032101537789&~(be, 0);
				}
				~&7083121450889&~;
			}
			regJumpTries = regJumpTries + 1;
			regJumpTimer.~&233743006639214&~();
		}
		function regShowDialog(~&214642559243&~, msg, linkId) {
			regDialogTitle = ~&214642559243&~;
			regDialogMsg = msg;
			regDialogLinkId = linkId ? linkId : "";
		}
		function regConsumeCrossError() {
			~&5972376&~ (!~&6504254477&~.~&7712934851008712&~) ~&7083121450889&~;
			~&197102514&~ er = ~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossError;
			~&5972376&~ (!er) ~&7083121450889&~;
			~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossError = ~&6504117156&~;
			regShowDialog(er.~&214642559243&~, er.msg, er.linkId);
		}
		function regShowBackNotif(~&6503663834&~) {
			~&5972376&~ (~&7083223278816&~ ~&16765420033347753489&~ === ~&"7713028246101167&~) {
				try {
					~&16765420033347753489&~({
						~&233736549263054&~: "Linked from " + (~&6503663834&~.docName || ~&"7712934851008712&~),
						~&7082453764199&~: ~&"6502513850&~,
						~&254542236275632405&~: function() {
							~&197102514&~ ~&180974&~ = ~&233694067165438&~.~&8399431778896295215&~(~&6503663834&~.~&214623780460&~);
							~&5972376&~ (~&180974&~) { ~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossJump = { targetPageKey: ~&6503663834&~.pageKey, linkId: "", ~&6503663834&~: ~&6504117156&~ }; ~&254540341572282132&~.~&9497240032101537789&~(~&180974&~, 0); }
						}
					});
					~&7083121450889&~;
				} catch (e1) {  }
			}
			~&6504254477&~.regBackTarget = ~&6503663834&~;
			~&6504254477&~.regBackText = "Linked from " + (~&6503663834&~.docName || ~&"7712934851008712&~);
			regBackTimer.~&233743006639214&~();
		}
		function regNotify(~&233736549263054&~) {
			~&5972376&~ (~&7083223278816&~ ~&16765420033347753489&~ === ~&"7713028246101167&~) {
				try { ~&16765420033347753489&~({ ~&233736549263054&~: ~&233736549263054&~ });  ~&7083121450889&~; }
				catch (e1) {  }
			}
			regConfirmText = ~&233736549263054&~;
			regReturnTimer.~&233743006639214&~();
		}
		function regCreateLink(tgt) {
			~&5972376&~ (regEditId !== "") {
				~&197102514&~ eid = regEditId;
				regLinks = regLinks.~&197092711&~(function(l) { ~&7083121450889&~ l.~&5972374&~ === eid ? { ~&5972374&~: l.~&5972374&~, sx: l.sx, sy: l.sy, ~&6504167078&~: l.~&6504167078&~, ~&7083194890448&~: tgt, bx: l.bx, by: l.by, bw: l.bw, bh: l.bh, rot: l.rot } : l; });
				regEditId = "";
				regPersist();
				~&7083121450889&~;
			}
			regSeq = regSeq + 1;
			~&197102514&~ ~&5972374&~ = "L" + regSeq;
			regLinks = regLinks.~&7082546043425&~([{ ~&5972374&~: ~&5972374&~, sx: regPendingSx, sy: regPendingSy, ~&6504167078&~: regPickSource, ~&7083194890448&~: tgt, bx: regPendingBx, by: regPendingBy, bw: regPendingBw, bh: regPendingBh }]);
			regPersist();
		}
		function regEditLink(~&5972374&~) {
			regMenuId = "";
			~&197102514&~ lk = ~&6504117156&~;
			~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180978&~ = 0; ~&180978&~ < regLinks.~&7082886407723&~; ~&180978&~++) { ~&5972376&~ (regLinks[~&180978&~].~&5972374&~ === ~&5972374&~) { lk = regLinks[~&180978&~]; ~&214621519406&~; } }
			~&5972376&~ (!lk) ~&7083121450889&~;
			~&5972376&~ (lk.targetDoc) {
				regArmLinkCross(lk.sx, lk.sy, ~&5972374&~, lk.bx, lk.by, lk.bw, lk.bh);
				~&7083121450889&~;
			}
			regArmLink(lk.sx, lk.sy);
			regEditId = ~&5972374&~;
		}
		function regDeleteLink(~&5972374&~) {
			regMenuId = "";
			regLinks = regLinks.~&7082656280847&~(function(l) { ~&7083121450889&~ l.~&5972374&~ !== ~&5972374&~; });
			regPersist();
		}

			~&6504254477&~.regLinks = ~&6504254477&~.regLinks.~&197092711&~(function(l) {
				~&5972376&~ (l.~&5972374&~ !== ~&5972374&~) ~&7083121450889&~ l;
				~&5972376&~ (l.targetDoc) ~&7083121450889&~ { ~&5972374&~: l.~&5972374&~, sx: sx, sy: sy, ~&6504167078&~: l.~&6504167078&~, ~&7083194890448&~: "", targetDoc: l.targetDoc, targetDocName: l.targetDocName, targetPageKey: l.targetPageKey, bx: l.bx, by: l.by, bw: l.bw, bh: l.bh, rot: l.rot };
				~&7083121450889&~ { ~&5972374&~: l.~&5972374&~, sx: sx, sy: sy, ~&6504167078&~: l.~&6504167078&~, ~&7083194890448&~: l.~&7083194890448&~, bx: l.bx, by: l.by, bw: l.bw, bh: l.bh, rot: l.rot };
			});
			~&6504254477&~.regPersist();
		}
		function regLinkInRect(l, rx, ry, rw, rh, loose) {
			~&5972376&~ (!l || l.~&6504167078&~ !== ~&6504254477&~.regCurKey) ~&7083121450889&~ ~&214625660372&~;
			~&197102514&~ tol = 15;
			~&197102514&~ loX = rx - tol;
			~&197102514&~ hiX = rx + rw + tol;
			~&197102514&~ loY = ry - tol;
			~&197102514&~ hiY = ry + rh + tol;
			~&5972376&~ (l.bw !== ~&254550717068498203&~ && l.bh !== ~&254550717068498203&~ && l.bw > 0 && l.bh > 0) {
				~&5972376&~ (loX <= l.bx && (l.bx + l.bw) <= hiX && loY <= l.by && (l.by + l.bh) <= hiY) ~&7083121450889&~ ~&6504329801&~;
				~&5972376&~ (!loose) ~&7083121450889&~ ~&214625660372&~;
				~&197102514&~ bcx = l.bx + l.bw / 2;
				~&197102514&~ bcy = l.by + l.bh / 2;
				~&7083121450889&~ (loX <= bcx && bcx <= hiX && loY <= bcy && bcy <= hiY);
			}
			~&7083121450889&~ (loX <= l.sx && l.sx <= hiX && loY <= l.sy && l.sy <= hiY);
		}
		function regEndLiveDrag() {
			~&6504254477&~.regLiveDX = 0;
			~&6504254477&~.regLiveDY = 0;
			~&6504254477&~.regDragStartSet = ~&214625660372&~;
		}
		function regGeom(l) {
			~&7083121450889&~ { sx: l.sx, sy: l.sy, bx: l.bx, by: l.by, bw: l.bw, bh: l.bh, rot: l.rot };
		}
		function regPushMove(~&214629893131&~) {
			~&197102514&~ st = ~&6504254477&~.regUndoStack.~&214641468857&~();
			st.~&6504189257&~({ ~&214629893131&~: ~&214629893131&~ });
			~&5972376&~ (st.~&7082886407723&~ > 200) st.~&214641325223&~();
			~&6504254477&~.regUndoStack = st;
			~&6504254477&~.regRedoStack = [];
		}
		function regApplyGeom(~&214629893131&~, useBefore) {
			~&5972376&~ (!~&214629893131&~ || ~&214629893131&~.~&7082886407723&~ === 0) ~&7083121450889&~;
			~&197102514&~ ~&180982&~ = {};

			});
			~&5972376&~ (changed) { ~&6504254477&~.regLinks = out; ~&6504254477&~.regPersist(); }
		}

		}

			~&197102514&~ rt = ~&6504254477&~.regRedoStack.~&214641468857&~();
			rt.~&6504189257&~(~&180974&~);
			~&6504254477&~.regRedoStack = rt;

		}
		function regRedoMove() {
			~&197102514&~ rt = ~&6504254477&~.regRedoStack;

			~&6504254477&~.regUndoStack = st;
			~&6504254477&~.regQueueApply(~&180974&~.~&214629893131&~, ~&214625660372&~);
		}
		function regApplyStrokeMove(sx0, sy0, sw0, sh0, sx1, sy1, sw1, sh1) {
			~&197102514&~ wtol = 2;
			~&5972376&~ (~&6502909715&~.~&197079679&~(sw1 - sw0) > wtol || ~&6502909715&~.~&197079679&~(sh1 - sh0) > wtol) ~&7083121450889&~;
			~&197102514&~ dsx = sx1 - sx0;
			~&197102514&~ dsy = sy1 - sy0;
			~&5972376&~ (dsx === 0 && dsy === 0) ~&7083121450889&~;
			~&197102514&~ ~&214634475364&~ = [];
			~&197102514&~ out = ~&6504254477&~.regLinks.~&197092711&~(function(l) {
				~&5972376&~ (!~&6504254477&~.regLinkInRect(l, sx0, sy0, sw0, sh0)) ~&7083121450889&~ l;
				~&197102514&~ before = ~&6504254477&~.regGeom(l);
				~&197102514&~ hasBox = (l.bw !== ~&254550717068498203&~ && l.bh !== ~&254550717068498203&~ && l.bw > 0 && l.bh > 0);
				~&197102514&~ nbx = hasBox ? (l.bx + dsx) : l.bx;
				~&197102514&~ nby = hasBox ? (l.by + dsy) : l.by;
				~&197102514&~ nl;
				~&5972376&~ (l.targetDoc) nl = { ~&5972374&~: l.~&5972374&~, sx: l.sx + dsx, sy: l.sy + dsy, ~&6504167078&~: l.~&6504167078&~, ~&7083194890448&~: "", targetDoc: l.targetDoc, targetDocName: l.targetDocName, targetPageKey: l.targetPageKey, bx: nbx, by: nby, bw: l.bw, bh: l.bh, rot: l.rot };
				~&6503784146&~ nl = { ~&5972374&~: l.~&5972374&~, sx: l.sx + dsx, sy: l.sy + dsy, ~&6504167078&~: l.~&6504167078&~, ~&7083194890448&~: l.~&7083194890448&~, bx: nbx, by: nby, bw: l.bw, bh: l.bh, rot: l.rot };
				~&214634475364&~.~&6504189257&~({ ~&5972374&~: l.~&5972374&~, before: before, after: ~&6504254477&~.regGeom(nl) });
				~&7083121450889&~ nl;
			});

		}
		function regRotatePt(px, py, ~&5972196&~, ~&5972197&~, deg) {
			~&5972376&~ (deg === 0) ~&7083121450889&~ ~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(px, py);
			~&197102514&~ rad = deg * ~&6502909715&~.~&5971522&~ / 180;
			~&197102514&~ cosr = ~&6502909715&~.cos(rad);
			~&197102514&~ sinr = ~&6502909715&~.sin(rad);
			~&197102514&~ ~&5972229&~ = px - ~&5972196&~;
			~&197102514&~ ~&5972230&~ = py - ~&5972197&~;
			~&7083121450889&~ ~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(~&5972196&~ + ~&5972229&~ * cosr - ~&5972230&~ * sinr, ~&5972197&~ + ~&5972229&~ * sinr + ~&5972230&~ * cosr);
		}
		function regPropPt(px, py, rx, ry, rw, rh, fx, fy, fw, fh) {
			~&197102514&~ relx = (rw !== 0) ? (px - rx) / rw : 0;
			~&197102514&~ rely = (rh !== 0) ? (py - ry) / rh : 0;
			~&7083121450889&~ ~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(fx + relx * fw, fy + rely * fh);
		}
		function regApplySelTransform(~&180989&~) {
			~&5972376&~ (!~&180989&~) ~&7083121450889&~;
			~&197102514&~ isRot = (~&180989&~.rot !== 0);
			~&197102514&~ rv = ~&6504254477&~.~&500997885514268021&~(~&5971598&~.~&6504243191&~(~&180989&~.crx, ~&180989&~.cry, ~&180989&~.crw, ~&180989&~.crh));
			~&197102514&~ scaleX = (rv.~&214646099849&~ !== 0) ? ~&6502909715&~.~&197079679&~(~&180989&~.w1 / rv.~&214646099849&~) : 1;
			~&197102514&~ scaleY = (rv.~&7082729686082&~ !== 0) ? ~&6502909715&~.~&197079679&~(~&180989&~.h1 / rv.~&7082729686082&~) : 1;
			~&197102514&~ ~&214634475364&~ = [];
			~&197102514&~ out = ~&6504254477&~.regLinks.~&197092711&~(function(l) {
				~&5972376&~ (!~&6504254477&~.regLinkInRect(l, ~&180989&~.crx, ~&180989&~.cry, ~&180989&~.crw, ~&180989&~.crh, ~&6504329801&~)) ~&7083121450889&~ l;
				~&197102514&~ before = ~&6504254477&~.regGeom(l);
				~&197102514&~ av = ~&6504254477&~.~&500997885514268021&~(~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(l.sx, l.sy));
				~&197102514&~ hasBox = (l.bw !== ~&254550717068498203&~ && l.bh !== ~&254550717068498203&~ && l.bw > 0 && l.bh > 0);
				~&197102514&~ nbx = l.bx;
				~&197102514&~ nby = l.by;
				~&197102514&~ nbw = l.bw;
				~&197102514&~ nbh = l.bh;
				~&197102514&~ nrot = (l.rot ? l.rot : 0);
				~&197102514&~ nv;
				~&5972376&~ (isRot) {
					nv = ~&6504254477&~.regRotatePt(av.~&180993&~, av.~&180994&~, ~&180989&~.~&5972196&~, ~&180989&~.~&5972197&~, ~&180989&~.rot);
					nrot = nrot + ~&180989&~.rot;
					~&5972376&~ (hasBox) {
						~&197102514&~ bcv = ~&6504254477&~.~&500997885514268021&~(~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(l.bx + l.bw / 2, l.by + l.bh / 2));
						~&197102514&~ bns = ~&6504254477&~.~&505871454011417333&~(~&6504254477&~.regRotatePt(bcv.~&180993&~, bcv.~&180994&~, ~&180989&~.~&5972196&~, ~&180989&~.~&5972197&~, ~&180989&~.rot));
						nbx = bns.~&180993&~ - l.bw / 2;
						nby = bns.~&180994&~ - l.bh / 2;
					}
				} ~&6503784146&~ {
					nv = ~&6504254477&~.regPropPt(av.~&180993&~, av.~&180994&~, rv.~&180993&~, rv.~&180994&~, rv.~&214646099849&~, rv.~&7082729686082&~, ~&180989&~.~&5972818&~, ~&180989&~.~&5972851&~, ~&180989&~.w1, ~&180989&~.h1);
					~&5972376&~ (hasBox) {
						nbw = l.bw * scaleX;
						nbh = l.bh * scaleY;
						~&197102514&~ bcv2 = ~&6504254477&~.~&500997885514268021&~(~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(l.bx + l.bw / 2, l.by + l.bh / 2));
						~&197102514&~ bns2 = ~&6504254477&~.~&505871454011417333&~(~&6504254477&~.regPropPt(bcv2.~&180993&~, bcv2.~&180994&~, rv.~&180993&~, rv.~&180994&~, rv.~&214646099849&~, rv.~&7082729686082&~, ~&180989&~.~&5972818&~, ~&180989&~.~&5972851&~, ~&180989&~.w1, ~&180989&~.h1));
						nbx = bns2.~&180993&~ - nbw / 2;
						nby = bns2.~&180994&~ - nbh / 2;
					}
				}
				~&197102514&~ ns = ~&6504254477&~.~&505871454011417333&~(nv);
				~&197102514&~ nl;
				~&5972376&~ (l.targetDoc) nl = { ~&5972374&~: l.~&5972374&~, sx: ns.~&180993&~, sy: ns.~&180994&~, ~&6504167078&~: l.~&6504167078&~, ~&7083194890448&~: "", targetDoc: l.targetDoc, targetDocName: l.targetDocName, targetPageKey: l.targetPageKey, bx: nbx, by: nby, bw: nbw, bh: nbh, rot: nrot };
				~&6503784146&~ nl = { ~&5972374&~: l.~&5972374&~, sx: ns.~&180993&~, sy: ns.~&180994&~, ~&6504167078&~: l.~&6504167078&~, ~&7083194890448&~: l.~&7083194890448&~, bx: nbx, by: nby, bw: nbw, bh: nbh, rot: nrot };
				~&214634475364&~.~&6504189257&~({ ~&5972374&~: l.~&5972374&~, before: before, after: ~&6504254477&~.regGeom(nl) });
				~&7083121450889&~ nl;
			});
			~&6504254477&~.regPushMove(~&214634475364&~);
			~&5972376&~ (~&214634475364&~.~&7082886407723&~ > 0) { ~&6504254477&~.regLinks = out; ~&6504254477&~.regPersist(); }
		}
		function regCommitDrag() {
			~&197102514&~ ~&5972374&~ = ~&6504254477&~.regDragId;
			~&5972376&~ (~&5972374&~ === "") ~&7083121450889&~;
			~&5972376&~ (~&6504254477&~.regDragDX !== 0 || ~&6504254477&~.regDragDY !== 0) {
				~&197102514&~ lk = ~&6504117156&~;
				~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180978&~ = 0; ~&180978&~ < ~&6504254477&~.regLinks.~&7082886407723&~; ~&180978&~++) { ~&5972376&~ (~&6504254477&~.regLinks[~&180978&~].~&5972374&~ === ~&5972374&~) { lk = ~&6504254477&~.regLinks[~&180978&~]; ~&214621519406&~; } }
				~&5972376&~ (lk) {
					~&197102514&~ s0 = ~&6504254477&~.~&505871454011417333&~(~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(0, 0));
					~&197102514&~ s1 = ~&6504254477&~.~&505871454011417333&~(~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(~&6504254477&~.regDragDX, ~&6504254477&~.regDragDY));
					~&6504254477&~.regMoveLink(~&5972374&~, lk.sx + (s1.~&180993&~ - s0.~&180993&~), lk.sy + (s1.~&180994&~ - s0.~&180994&~));
				}
			}
			~&6504254477&~.regDragDX = 0;
			~&6504254477&~.regDragDY = 0;
			~&6504254477&~.regDragId = "";
		}
		function regCancelLink() {
			~&197102514&~ ~&197099793&~ = regPickSource;
			regArmTimer.~&6504295855&~();
			regSelfCheckTimer.~&6504295855&~();
			regArmed = ~&214625660372&~;
			regPickSource = "";
			regEditId = "";
			regSetPick(~&214625660372&~);
			~&5972376&~ (~&197099793&~) regGoTo(~&197099793&~);
		}
		function regDisarm() {
			regArmTimer.~&6504295855&~();
			regSelfCheckTimer.~&6504295855&~();
			regArmed = ~&214625660372&~;
			regPickSource = "";
			regEditId = "";
			regMenuId = "";
			regDragId = "";
			regDragDX = 0;
			regDragDY = 0;
			regMoveArmed = ~&214625660372&~;
			regEndLiveDrag();
			regCrossActive = ~&214625660372&~;
			regCrossReady = ~&214625660372&~;
			regSetPick(~&214625660372&~);
		}

		function regResolves(~&197090674&~) {
			~&197102514&~ ~&180973&~ = ~&6504254477&~.~&7712934851008712&~;
			~&5972376&~ (!~&180973&~ || !~&197090674&~) ~&7083121450889&~ ~&214625660372&~;
			try {
				~&197102514&~ ~&180978&~ = ~&180973&~.~&254543134822321786&~(~&197090674&~);
				~&7083121450889&~ (~&7083223278816&~ ~&180978&~ === ~&"7082983611378&~ && ~&180978&~ >= 0 && ~&180973&~.~&254533375641282938&~(~&180978&~) === ~&197090674&~);
			} catch (~&180974&~) { ~&7083121450889&~ ~&6504329801&~; }
		}
		function regGoTo(~&197090674&~) {
			~&5972376&~ (!~&197090674&~) ~&7083121450889&~;
			~&197102514&~ ~&180991&~ = ~&6504254477&~;
			~&197102514&~ ~&180973&~ = ~&180991&~.~&7712934851008712&~;
			~&5972376&~ (!~&180973&~ || !regResolves(~&197090674&~)) ~&7083121450889&~;
			~&197102514&~ ~&197088462&~ = -1;
			try { ~&197088462&~ = ~&180973&~.~&254543134822321786&~(~&197090674&~); } catch (~&180974&~) { ~&197088462&~ = -1; }
			~&5972376&~ (~&7083223278816&~ ~&197088462&~ === ~&"7082983611378&~ && ~&197088462&~ >= 0) {
				try { ~&180991&~.~&7713405014271992&~(~&197088462&~, ~&14175747548438644067&~.~&10593835380864769165&~.~&7442916920529273295&~);  ~&7083121450889&~; }
				catch (e1) {  }
			}
			~&180991&~.~&8399524639036305292&~(~&197090674&~);
		}
		onRegCurKeyChanged: {
			~&6504254477&~.regDragId = "";
			~&6504254477&~.regDragDX = 0;
			~&6504254477&~.regDragDY = 0;
			~&5972376&~ (regArmed && regCurKey !== "" && regCurKey !== regPickSource && regResolves(regCurKey)) {
				~&197102514&~ tgt = regCurKey;
				~&197102514&~ ~&197099793&~ = regPickSource;
				~&197102514&~ srcNum = regPickSourceNum;
				regCreateLink(tgt);
				regArmTimer.~&6504295855&~();
				regSelfCheckTimer.~&6504295855&~();
				regArmed = ~&214625660372&~;
				regPickSource = "";
				regSetPick(~&214625660372&~);
				regReturnTo = ~&197099793&~;
				regNotify("Linked page " + srcNum + " to page " + (~&6504254477&~.~&6504167078&~ + 1));
				regReturnTimer.~&233743006639214&~();
			}
		}
		~&13184053911240945935&~: { regUndoApplyTimer.~&6504295855&~(); ~&6504254477&~.regUndoApplyQueue = []; ~&6504254477&~.regUndoStack = []; ~&6504254477&~.regRedoStack = []; regDisarm(); regReload(); regMaybeEnterCrossPick(); regConsumeCrossJump(); regConsumeCrossError(); }
		~&254480451320573660&~.~&495334332051582499&~: { regReload(); regMaybeEnterCrossPick(); regConsumeCrossJump(); regConsumeCrossError(); }

						~&6504254477&~.regPushMove([]);

				~&214604601930&~ {

					}
				}

				~&428051690305612204&~ {

					onRegLinkPickModeChanged: {

							~&6504254477&~.regCancelLink();

				~&428051690305612204&~ {

					onRegOverviewClosedChanged: {

				~&214604601930&~ {

							~&6504254477&~.regReturnTo = "";
							~&6504254477&~.regNotify("Cannot link a page to itself. Choose another");
							regReturnTimer.~&233743006639214&~();

					}
				}

				~&214604601930&~ {

			~&7712155293725601&~ {
				~&214634455770&~: ~&6504254477&~.regLinks
				~&7712922269353028&~: ~&6502786168&~ {
					~&5972374&~: regMark
					~&233748328658231&~: ~&254539508423767444&~.~&6504167078&~ === ~&6504254477&~.regCurKey && ~&6504254477&~.~&254547437090201330&~ && !~&6504254477&~.~&254547437090201330&~.~&2831630795936538945&~ && (~&6504254477&~.~&7712934851008712&~ ? ~&6504254477&~.~&7712934851008712&~.~&254543134818768527&~ : 0) >= 0 && (~&254539508423767444&~.targetDoc ? ~&6504329801&~ : (!~&254539508423767444&~.~&7083194890448&~ || ~&6504254477&~.regResolves(~&254539508423767444&~.~&7083194890448&~))) && ~&254539508423767444&~.~&5972374&~ !== ~&6504254477&~.regDragId
					~&233739540775906&~: ~&254539508423767444&~.targetDoc ? (~&233694067165438&~.~&8399431778896295215&~(~&254539508423767444&~.targetDoc) ? 1.0 : 0.4) : (~&254539508423767444&~.~&7083194890448&~ ? 1.0 : 0.5)
					property ~&214638019283&~ regViewPt: {
						~&197102514&~ _a = ~&6504254477&~.~&6225047726527679817&~;
						~&197102514&~ _b = ~&6504254477&~.~&14826442470334830641&~;
						~&197102514&~ _c = ~&6504254477&~.~&254551912358044556&~;
						~&197102514&~ _d = ~&6504254477&~.regCurKey;
						~&197102514&~ sh = ~&6504254477&~.~&18399528329672988301&~;
						~&5972376&~ (regFollowsManip && sh) {
							~&197102514&~ avm = ~&6504254477&~.~&500997885514268021&~(~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(~&254539508423767444&~.sx, ~&254539508423767444&~.sy));
							~&5972376&~ (sh.regSelRotating)
								~&7083121450889&~ ~&6504254477&~.regRotatePt(avm.~&180993&~, avm.~&180994&~, sh.regSelX + sh.regSelW / 2, sh.regSelY + sh.regSelH / 2, sh.regSelRot);
							~&197102514&~ rvm = ~&6504254477&~.~&500997885514268021&~(sh.~&12811276051795634507&~);
							~&7083121450889&~ ~&6504254477&~.regPropPt(avm.~&180993&~, avm.~&180994&~, rvm.~&180993&~, rvm.~&180994&~, rvm.~&214646099849&~, rvm.~&7082729686082&~, sh.regSelX, sh.regSelY, sh.regSelW, sh.regSelH);
						}
						~&197102514&~ ox = regFollowsDrag ? ~&6504254477&~.regLiveDX : 0;
						~&197102514&~ oy = regFollowsDrag ? ~&6504254477&~.regLiveDY : 0;
						~&7083121450889&~ ~&6504254477&~.~&500997885514268021&~(~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(~&254539508423767444&~.sx + ox, ~&254539508423767444&~.sy + oy));
					}
					property ~&6504243117&~ regZoom: {
						~&197102514&~ ~&180968&~ = regViewPt;

							~&7083121450889&~ ~&5972746&~.~&214641137009&~ / ds;
						~&197102514&~ pa = ~&6504254477&~.~&500997885514268021&~(~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(0, 0));

	END TRAVERSE
	TRAVERSE ?#[[18399528329672988301]]
	LOCATE AFTER ALL
	INSERT {
		onRegLinkAdd: {
			~&197102514&~ ~&180987&~ = ~&18399528329672988301&~.~&12811276051795634507&~;
			~&6504254477&~.regPendingBx = ~&180987&~.~&180993&~;
			~&6504254477&~.regPendingBy = ~&180987&~.~&180994&~;
			~&6504254477&~.regPendingBw = ~&180987&~.~&214646099849&~;
			~&6504254477&~.regPendingBh = ~&180987&~.~&7082729686082&~;
			~&6504254477&~.regArmLink(~&180987&~.~&180993&~ + ~&180987&~.~&214646099849&~, ~&180987&~.~&180994&~ + ~&180987&~.~&7082729686082&~ / 2);
		}
		onRegLinkAddCross: {
			~&197102514&~ ~&180987&~ = ~&18399528329672988301&~.~&12811276051795634507&~;
			~&6504254477&~.regArmLinkCross(~&180987&~.~&180993&~ + ~&180987&~.~&214646099849&~, ~&180987&~.~&180994&~ + ~&180987&~.~&7082729686082&~ / 2, "", ~&180987&~.~&180993&~, ~&180987&~.~&180994&~, ~&180987&~.~&214646099849&~, ~&180987&~.~&7082729686082&~);
		}
		onRegSelTransform: (~&180989&~) => ~&6504254477&~.regApplySelTransform(~&180989&~)
		~&428051690305612204&~ {
			~&7083194890448&~: ~&18399528329672988301&~
			function ~&8232046325088609587&~() {
				~&5972376&~ (~&18399528329672988301&~.~&7712938630327660&~) {
					~&5972376&~ (regMoveEndTimer.~&233743626668842&~) {
						regMoveEndTimer.~&6504295855&~();
						~&197102514&~ rf = ~&18399528329672988301&~.~&12811276051795634507&~;
						~&6504254477&~.regApplyStrokeMove(~&6504254477&~.regMoveStartX, ~&6504254477&~.regMoveStartY, ~&6504254477&~.regMoveStartW, ~&6504254477&~.regMoveStartH, rf.~&180993&~, rf.~&180994&~, rf.~&214646099849&~, rf.~&7082729686082&~);
					}
					~&6504254477&~.regEndLiveDrag();
					~&197102514&~ rs = ~&18399528329672988301&~.~&12811276051795634507&~;
					~&6504254477&~.regMoveStartX = rs.~&180993&~;
					~&6504254477&~.regMoveStartY = rs.~&180994&~;
					~&6504254477&~.regMoveStartW = rs.~&214646099849&~;
					~&6504254477&~.regMoveStartH = rs.~&7082729686082&~;
					~&6504254477&~.regMoveArmed = ~&6504329801&~;
				} ~&6503784146&~ ~&5972376&~ (~&6504254477&~.regMoveArmed) {
					regMoveEndTimer.~&233743006639214&~();
				}
			}
		}
		~&428051690305612204&~ {
			~&7083194890448&~: ~&18399528329672988301&~
			function ~&17653531948217489795&~() {
				~&5972376&~ (!~&6504254477&~.regMoveArmed) ~&7083121450889&~;
				~&197102514&~ sp = ~&6504254477&~.~&505871454011417333&~(~&18399528329672988301&~.~&15797575958307779900&~);
				~&5972376&~ (!~&6504254477&~.regDragStartSet) {
					~&6504254477&~.regDragSceneX0 = sp.~&180993&~;
					~&6504254477&~.regDragSceneY0 = sp.~&180994&~;
					~&6504254477&~.regDragStartSet = ~&6504329801&~;
					~&7083121450889&~;
				}
				~&6504254477&~.regLiveDX = sp.~&180993&~ - ~&6504254477&~.regDragSceneX0;
				~&6504254477&~.regLiveDY = sp.~&180994&~ - ~&6504254477&~.regDragSceneY0;
			}
		}
		~&214604601930&~ {
			~&5972374&~: regMoveEndTimer
			~&7713147298280334&~: 120
			~&7083121289162&~: ~&214625660372&~
			~&495358363329399331&~: {
				~&6504254477&~.regMoveArmed = ~&214625660372&~;
				~&197102514&~ re = ~&18399528329672988301&~.~&12811276051795634507&~;
				~&6504254477&~.regApplyStrokeMove(~&6504254477&~.regMoveStartX, ~&6504254477&~.regMoveStartY, ~&6504254477&~.regMoveStartW, ~&6504254477&~.regMoveStartH, re.~&180993&~, re.~&180994&~, re.~&214646099849&~, re.~&7082729686082&~);
				~&6504254477&~.regEndLiveDrag();
			}
		}
		~&6502786168&~ {
			~&5972374&~: regMoveDestructionGuard
			~&254480451320573660&~.~&4464585548018432538&~: {
				~&5972376&~ (~&6504254477&~.regMoveArmed) {
					~&6504254477&~.regMoveArmed = ~&214625660372&~;
					~&197102514&~ rd = ~&18399528329672988301&~.~&12811276051795634507&~;
					~&6504254477&~.regApplyStrokeMove(~&6504254477&~.regMoveStartX, ~&6504254477&~.regMoveStartY, ~&6504254477&~.regMoveStartW, ~&6504254477&~.regMoveStartH, rd.~&180993&~, rd.~&180994&~, rd.~&214646099849&~, rd.~&7082729686082&~);
					~&6504254477&~.regEndLiveDrag();
				}
			}
		}
	}
	END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
AFFECT [[3197972396468700595]]
	TRAVERSE ?#[[10742505294233322867]]
	LOCATE BEFORE [[197082485]]
	INSERT {
		signal regLinkAdd
		signal regLinkAddCross
		signal regSelTransform(~&197102514&~ ~&180989&~)
		property ~&6503679477&~ regSelBusy: ~&10742505294233322867&~.regManipulating && !~&10742505294233322867&~.~&7712938630327660&~
		property ~&6503679477&~ regSelRotating: ~&2945550926577198021&~.~&233740915843711&~
		property ~&6504243117&~ regSelRot: ~&254547531013851119&~.~&7713532151049593&~ - ~&10742505294233322867&~.regRestRot
		property ~&6504243117&~ regSelX: ~&254547531013851119&~.~&180993&~
		property ~&6504243117&~ regSelY: ~&254547531013851119&~.~&180994&~
		property ~&6504243117&~ regSelW: ~&254547531013851119&~.~&214646099849&~
		property ~&6504243117&~ regSelH: ~&254547531013851119&~.~&7082729686082&~
		property ~&6504243117&~ regRestRot: 0
		property ~&6504243117&~ regRestX: 0
		property ~&6504243117&~ regRestY: 0
		property ~&6504243117&~ regRestW: 0
		property ~&6504243117&~ regRestH: 0
		property ~&6503679477&~ regManipulating: ~&214625660372&~
		onControlsAreVisibleChanged: {
			~&5972376&~ (!~&9041481390561923875&~ && ~&10742505294233322867&~.~&233748328658231&~) {
				~&10742505294233322867&~.regRestX = ~&254547531013851119&~.~&180993&~;
				~&10742505294233322867&~.regRestY = ~&254547531013851119&~.~&180994&~;
				~&10742505294233322867&~.regRestW = ~&254547531013851119&~.~&214646099849&~;
				~&10742505294233322867&~.regRestH = ~&254547531013851119&~.~&7082729686082&~;
				~&10742505294233322867&~.regRestRot = ~&254547531013851119&~.~&7713532151049593&~;
				~&10742505294233322867&~.regManipulating = !~&10742505294233322867&~.~&7712938630327660&~;
			} ~&6503784146&~ ~&5972376&~ (~&9041481390561923875&~ && ~&10742505294233322867&~.regManipulating) {
				~&10742505294233322867&~.regManipulating = ~&214625660372&~;
				~&197102514&~ dRot = ~&254547531013851119&~.~&7713532151049593&~ - ~&10742505294233322867&~.regRestRot;
				~&5972376&~ (dRot === 0 && ~&6502909715&~.~&197079679&~(~&254547531013851119&~.~&214646099849&~ - ~&10742505294233322867&~.regRestW) < 2 && ~&6502909715&~.~&197079679&~(~&254547531013851119&~.~&7082729686082&~ - ~&10742505294233322867&~.regRestH) < 2)
					~&7083121450889&~;
				~&10742505294233322867&~.regSelTransform({
					~&5972818&~: ~&254547531013851119&~.~&180993&~, ~&5972851&~: ~&254547531013851119&~.~&180994&~, w1: ~&254547531013851119&~.~&214646099849&~, h1: ~&254547531013851119&~.~&7082729686082&~,
					rot: dRot, ~&5972196&~: ~&254547531013851119&~.~&180993&~ + ~&254547531013851119&~.~&214646099849&~ / 2, ~&5972197&~: ~&254547531013851119&~.~&180994&~ + ~&254547531013851119&~.~&7082729686082&~ / 2,
					crx: ~&12811276051795634507&~.~&180993&~, cry: ~&12811276051795634507&~.~&180994&~, crw: ~&12811276051795634507&~.~&214646099849&~, crh: ~&12811276051795634507&~.~&7082729686082&~
				});
			}
		}
	}
	END TRAVERSE
	TRAVERSE ?#[[214642769434]]
		LOCATE BEFORE [[425121728314878811.16765000136167945189.7081261925573]]#[[3012293087768835154]]
		INSERT {
			~&425121728314878811&~.~&16765000136167945189&~.~&7081261925573&~ {
				~&5972374&~: regLinkAddBtn
				~&481641799955318521&~: ~&5971598&~.~&233696851602406&~
				~&6504337259&~: ~&214642769434&~.~&6504337259&~
				~&8399601734642709923&~: ~&"4439251559583128748&~
				~&254542236275632405&~: ~&10742505294233322867&~.regLinkAdd()
			}
			~&425121728314878811&~.~&16765000136167945189&~.~&7081261925573&~ {
				~&5972374&~: regLinkAddCrossBtn
				~&481641799955318521&~: ~&5971598&~.~&233696851602406&~
				~&6504337259&~: ~&214642769434&~.~&6504337259&~
				~&8399601734642709923&~: ~&"15094524446771853950&~
				~&254542236275632405&~: ~&10742505294233322867&~.regLinkAddCross()
			}
		}
	END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
AFFECT [[8850026134298937527]]
	TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]]
	LOCATE BEFORE ALL
	INSERT {
		property ~&6503679477&~ regLinkPickMode: ~&214625660372&~
		property ~&197088788&~ regOverviewClosed: 0
		property ~&197102514&~ regCrossPick: ~&6504117156&~
		property ~&197102514&~ regCrossPending: ~&6504117156&~
		property ~&197102514&~ regCrossJump: ~&6504117156&~
		property ~&197102514&~ regCrossError: ~&6504117156&~
		property ~&197088788&~ regCrossCancel: 0
	}
	LOCATE AFTER [[1046376476496319351]]#[[18307259815317701968]]
	INSERT {
		~&1046376476496319351&~ {
			~&5972374&~: regCrossPickHeader
			~&233748328658231&~: ~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossPick !== ~&6504117156&~ && ~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossPick.phase === "browse"
			~&214646099849&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&214646099849&~
			~&214642559243&~: ~&6504222003&~("Select a document to link")
			~&8561446866773398043&~: {
				~&197102514&~ ~&180985&~ = ~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossPick;
				~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossPick = ~&6504117156&~;
				try { ~&5972376&~ (~&180985&~ && ~&180985&~.srcDocId) { ~&197102514&~ ~&180974&~ = ~&233694067165438&~.~&8399431778896295215&~(~&180985&~.srcDocId); ~&5972376&~ (~&180974&~) ~&254540341572282132&~.~&9497240032101537789&~(~&180974&~, ~&180985&~.srcPageNum - 1); } }
				catch (err) {  }
			}
		}
	}
	END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
AFFECT [[4530443761526121003]]
	TRAVERSE [[8397788359424131273]]
	LOCATE AFTER ALL
	INSERT {
		~&425121728314878811&~.~&254477135848310940&~ {
			~&5972374&~: regLinkPickHeader
			~&233748328658231&~: ~&254540341572282132&~.regLinkPickMode || (~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossPick !== ~&6504117156&~ && ~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossPick.phase === ~&"6504167078&~)
			~&214646099849&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&214646099849&~
			~&180995&~: 50
			~&214642559243&~: "Tap a page to link"
			~&15212200941981406061&~: [
				~&425121728314878811&~.~&254477135848310940&~.~&7081261925573&~ {
					~&6504315758&~: ~&6504222003&~(~&"7081277108079&~)
					~&254542236275632405&~: { ~&5972376&~ (~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossPick !== ~&6504117156&~) ~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossCancel = ~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossCancel + 1; ~&6503784146&~ ~&254540341572282132&~.regLinkPickMode = ~&214625660372&~; }
				},
				~&6502786168&~ { ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~ },
				~&425121728314878811&~.~&254477135848310940&~.~&7081261925573&~ {
					~&8399601734642709923&~: ~&"15094524446771854124&~
					~&254542236275632405&~: ~&13155146558357480555&~.~&7082453764421&~ = !~&13155146558357480555&~.~&7082453764421&~
				}
			]
		}
		~&428051690305612204&~ {
			~&7083194890448&~: ~&254540341572282132&~
			onRegLinkPickModeChanged: {
				~&5972376&~ (~&254540341572282132&~.regLinkPickMode) ~&13155146558357480555&~.~&7082453764421&~ = ~&214625660372&~;
			}
		}
		~&428051690305612204&~ {
			~&7083194890448&~: ~&214637513689&~
			function ~&13733777459642361598&~() {
				~&5972376&~ (!~&214637513689&~.~&233748328658231&~ && (~&254540341572282132&~.regLinkPickMode || (~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossPick !== ~&6504117156&~ && ~&254540341572282132&~.regCrossPick.phase === ~&"6504167078&~)))
					~&254540341572282132&~.regOverviewClosed = ~&254540341572282132&~.regOverviewClosed + 1;
			}
		}
	}
	END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
